title: Killer’s Parents Could Have Prevented Southport Attack in U.K., Report Says
summary_full: An official inquiry said the perpetrator’s parents, as well as government agencies, had missed several chances to avert the deadly attack.
summary_public: An official inquiry said the perpetrator’s parents, as well as government agencies, had missed several chances to avert the deadly attack.
